creator: nimaje+fbz@bureaucracy.de
text: ah, yes. I was thinking about whatever USE_QT=wayland influences here, but maybe it is a no-op with these CMAKE_ARGS. So it should be checked that telegram doesn't regress here if build for X11 and run on wayland and without having qt*-wayland installed (which would be possible with this if telegram was the only thing depending on qt*-wayland installed)
